posts.text:
Never in my life have I seen this many people have such strong opinions about the Catholic faith. 

It is fantastic. 

A new dawn in America. ✝️

Without question, the classiest event I have ever attended in D.C.  Sold-out! 
A focus on God and praying for our country’s leaders. 
There is youth Catholic movement building in America and it is a truly good thing.


Catholics for Catholics 🇺🇲 (@CforCatholics)

3rd Catholic Prayer for America - Washington DC - Feast of Saint Joseph nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1OGwblzbW…




— https://nitter.net/CforCatholics/status/2034978558897205617#m
@GenFlynn — I told people afterward—now I understand why you are a General! I would have followed you into any crusade battlefield after that speech! X  ✝️

Americans are against this war as well. The entire world is against Epstein’s War.


Jackson Hinkle 🇺🇸 (@jacksonhinklle)

🚨🇪🇸🇺🇸🇮🇷 "Not just Spain, all of Europe is against this illegal war in Iran. We won't join it, no matter what" - Spanish PM Pedro Sánchez

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/jacksonhinklle/status/2034633237197119933#m

😂😂😂
The fact that North Korea is producing more authentic looking polls is actually hilarious. 
Tomorrow: TRUMP receives 165% approval.


Dave Smith (@ComicDaveSmith)

Kim Jung Un was just elected with a slightly smaller percentage, so it checks out to me.



— https://nitter.net/ComicDaveSmith/status/2034639858392609230#m

How could anyone look at a poll like this and actually believe it. LMAO. It’s cartoonish. These people are too dumb to produce something more reasonable looking like “82%” approval. 
American Pravda.


Tammie McDonald 🇺🇸🇺🇸 (@TammieMcDonal17)

Come again.. the base is fine, you not so much





— https://nitter.net/TammieMcDonal17/status/2034625032933036034#m

Read inbetween the lines: Trump is angry and they need to show him something positive. 

Zionists are now moving to Pravda, publishing fictional polls so they have something positive to put on his desk this morning.

NO ONE supports this war outside of Never-Trumpers who have always been Israel-First. They are losing the war badly and seek to further delude Trump into believing his base wanted it.


New York Post (@nypost)

Republicans overwhelmingly back Trump over Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly o

Not only is Trump losing the war, he has also completely forfeited his legacy and base.

This is panic. They are in a state of panic. And will surround him with fairytales now regarding how much his base loves him and hates Iran. 

We are reaching historical levels of delusion.

Wrong. He never had any control of this war. He just had deranged, bloodthirsty neocons in his ear telling him that he would be great if he did it. 

He should have listened to Charlie Kirk.


Piers Morgan (@piersmorgan)

Trump is losing control of this war.



— https://nitter.net/piersmorgan/status/2034514825548578922#m

“This is not a time for fear. This is a time for clarity. We must reject hatred. We must reject false accusations. We must reject every attempt to force the Church into conformity with worldly ideologies.” 

Amen. ✝️


Sign of the Cross (@CatholicSOTC)

Bishop Strickland: Faithful Catholics are being labeled as “anti-Semitic” simply for refusing to adopt Christian Zionism.

lifesitenews.com/opinion/bis…





— https://nitter.net/CatholicSOTC/status/2034412031822942382#m

Today on the show: 

-When Erika Met Charlie: the untold story which involves—Kanye West? 
-What exactly was Erika doing for work in the most expensive city in the world?
